sections.paragraph:
μεταυτίκα (Hdt. 2, 161; 5, 112) adv. directly after AcPl Ha 7, 8f: μεταυ̣[τίκα δὲ οὕτ]ως.—DELG s.v. αὐτός.

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

AcPl Ha AcPl Ha = Acts of Paul, PHamb—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 642
